verdicts.reasoning: The center cross-sections reveal one oak furnishing and a red-wool centerpiece behind an otherwise plain stone shell.
verdicts.comment: Your hidden red centerpiece gives the room a clear color idea. Add a doorway and oak seat next.

verdicts.reasoning: The center slices reveal a small color focal point, while the sealed exterior and sparse room leave lots of room to develop.
verdicts.comment: Your red interior block makes a bold focal point. Add a window and warm floor pattern next.

verdicts.reasoning: The cutaway views show a small started interior, but the cabin still needs an entrance, windows, and more furniture.
verdicts.comment: Your oak furnishing gives the small room a warm start. Add a doorway and window to open the cabin next.
